name: dart-mcp
description: Korea FSS electronic disclosure (DART / OpenDART): company disclosures, corporate profiles, and financial statements for KOSPI/KOSDAQ/KONEX-listed and unlisted issuers.
author: Yongbum Kim

DART_API_KEY.description: OpenDART API key (40-character string). Register free at https://opendart.fss.or.kr. Required for all tools.
